description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has multiple jobs: GCC, Tarball, Clang, and Docker push. The GCC, Tarball, and Clang jobs run on ubuntu-20.04, checkout the repository with submodules, source ubuntu dependencies and build scripts, and upload coverage to Codecov. The Docker push job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the GCC, Tarball, and Clang jobs, and builds and pushes a Docker image with metadata and tags.
